mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, actor_user_id, provider, mode, status, started_at, last_activity_at, completed_at, failure_reason, last_event_id FROM project_acp_sessions WHERE project_id = #{project_id} AND id = #{id}

SELECT id, project_id, actor_user_id, provider, mode, status, started_at, last_activity_at, completed_at, failure_reason, last_event_id FROM project_acp_sessions WHERE project_id = #{project_id} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{from}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_acp_sessions( project_id, actor_user_id, provider, mode, status, started_at, last_activity_at, completed_at, failure_reason, last_event_id ) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{description.actor, typeHandler=reengineering.ddd.mybatis.support.RefIntegerTypeHandler}, #{description.provider}, #{description.mode}, #{description.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description.startedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description.lastActivityAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description.completedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{description.failureReason}, #{description.lastEventId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE project_acp_sessions SET status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, completed_at = #{completed_at, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, failure_reason = #{failure_reason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{project_id} AND id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM project_acp_sessions WHERE project_id = #{project_id}
